testcase.name: test_feed_cache_and_robots_headers[/merchant-feed.xml]

failure.message: AssertionError: /merchant-feed.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py:57: in test_feed_cache_and_robots_headers assert "public" in cc and "max-age=3600" in cc, f"{path} Cache-Control={cc!r}" E AssertionError: /merchant-feed.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.name: test_feed_cache_and_robots_headers[/feed/google-products.xml]

failure.message: AssertionError: /feed/google-products.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py:57: in test_feed_cache_and_robots_headers assert "public" in cc and "max-age=3600" in cc, f"{path} Cache-Control={cc!r}" E AssertionError: /feed/google-products.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

failure.message: AssertionError: /feeds/google-products.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py:57: in test_feed_cache_and_robots_headers assert "public" in cc and "max-age=3600" in cc, f"{path} Cache-Control={cc!r}" E AssertionError: /feeds/google-products.xml Cache-Control='no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert ('public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate')

testcase.name: test_random_5_items_have_gtin_and_resolvable_links
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py:107: in test_random_5_items_have_gtin_and_resolvable_links assert r.status_code == 200, f"product link {link} -> {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: product link https://show-live-7.cluster-5.preview.emergentcf.cloud/product.php?slug=ms-visio-professional-2019-pc -> 403 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
